title: Miniature fig and blueberry cake for dollhouse in 1:12 scale
description: A delicate and detailed miniature fig and blueberry cake scene in 1:12 scale — entirely handcrafted. This set features a decorated cake with a cut-out slice, a separate slice of cake on a plate, tiny figs, blueberries, leaves, cream details, and layered cake filling. Every cake layer, fruit, leaf, cream detail, and plate was sculpted, painted, and assembled by me with great attention to detail. The cake and slice are securely glued to the plates. Perfect for collectors, doll…
